name: Roaring Potion (Moderate)
description:
Activate 1 Interact

Ripples move constantly through a roaring potion, a cloudy liquid that growls when you open its container. Drinking it gives you access to two other activations for 1 hour.

Activate 1 envision

Effect You gain the effects of a 5th-rank spell. You can Dismiss the activation.

Activate 1 envision

Frequency once every [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}

Effect You emit a scream in a that deals |options:area-damage]. Each creature in the area can attempt a saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is Frightened 1.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is Frightened 2.
